description: Codex runtime surface matrix for Agentica OS governance. This is intentionally tracked in Governance so Codex is measured and governed, not only counted in telemetry.

surfaces.discoverabilityContract: runtime home exists and is not silently substituted
session records used by the Codex telemetry emitter
runtime helper scripts, including telemetry emitters
sandbox state stays inside the runtime root

boundaryInvariants: Codex telemetry must validate against the canonical agentica.1 schema.
Codex runtime surfaces must resolve under ~/.codex; no local fallback copy is acceptable.
Governance owns this matrix; Codex runtime may emit telemetry but must not rewrite its own governance policy.
knownGaps: This first verifier covers runtime shape, surface resolution, and telemetry schema. Deeper Codex hook and sandbox policy checks should be added once the runtime contract is formalized.
